verdict: PAIRED DEFENSE CLOSES THE HOLE (CI-robust) — naive as-asked confidently-fooled 11/60=18% (Wilson [0.1056, 0.2992], itself underpowered: CI crosses 0.20) → DEFENDED canonical 1/60=1.7% (Wilson [0.0029, 0.0886]).
